title: 用免費VPN 幾乎比人偷email account 密碼

replies.msg:
昨日ipad 用左半個鐘VPN, 就係果段時間，google send 個mail黎，話「有人已取得您的密碼」，而取得密碼嘅「人」就係我google 嘅後備email

果段時間我淨係玩過VPN睇youtube, 咁巧合，即係個VPN 有d嘢啦？

個apps 係日本apps store 綠貓vpn
下次都係比錢用VPN.......
此回覆已被刪除

比錢用都係會比人偷

自己搭個最安全

replies.msg: 我都有收到呢個warning，但係我冇用VPN

岩岩有人send mail 講知道我pw 同id
而真係2樣又岩晒
入面有條野咁講


Well, i actually placed a software on the xxx videos (sex sites) web-site and guess what, you visited this site to have fun (you know what i mean). When you were watching videos, your web browser started operating as a RDP having a key logger which gave me accessibility to your display and also web camera. Right after that, my software program gathered all of your contacts from your Messenger, FB, as well as emailaccount. and then i made a double video. 1st part shows the video you were viewing (you've got a good taste ; )), and 2nd part shows the view of your cam, yeah it is you.

之後仲要我俾BTC佢
去過咩網先會咁？
